sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR(100), created_at DATE, age INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 'Alice', DATE '2022-01-01', 30), (2, 'Bob', NULL, NULL), (3, '', DATE '1990-12-31', 25);
SELECT length(name) + LENGTH(name) AS combined_length FROM test_data WHERE created_at + age > DATE '2022-01-02' OR created_at IS NULL;
SELECT id, length(name) AS name_length FROM test_data WHERE name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id, name HAVING length(name) > 0;
SELECT id, length(name + ' ' + name) AS total_length FROM test_data WHERE LENGTH(name + ' test') < 15 ORDER BY total_length;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (ref_id INTEGER, description VARCHAR(250));
INSERT INTO additional_data VALUES (1, 'Sample Data'), (2, NULL), (3, 'Test Entry with Emoji 🦆');
SELECT t.id, a.description, length(a.description) + 7 AS description_length FROM test_data t JOIN additional_data a ON t.id = a.ref_id WHERE a.description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t.id, length(name) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM additional_data WHERE ref_id = t.id) AS name_count FROM test_data t WHERE length(name) < 100 HAVING name_count > 0;
SELECT t.id, length(name) AS name_length, created_at + age FROM test_data t WHERE name = '' OR created_at IS NULL ORDER BY name_length DESC;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, name, length(name) AS character_count FROM test_data WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(character_count + IIF(age IS NULL, 1, age)) AS adjusted_average FROM temp_data;
